name: Watercress Goat Cheese Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 oz mild goat cheese, well chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. On each of 4 salad plates, place some watercress and pecans.
2. Cut the goat cheese into 8 slices.
3. Place 2 slices of goat cheese on each salad.
4. Arrange 2 goat cheese slices on each salad.
